name: Nyxian BuildKit source import
license: AGPL-3.0 for Nyxian project; individual imported files retain their upstream headers
purpose: Source-level import, fakefs staging bridge, local/native ABI wrapper, and LiveContainer/ZSign iOS signing support for Litter on-device Swift/iOS BuildKit integration.
knownSourceGaps: Private Apple SDK and CoreCompiler assets must be installed through LitterBuildKitAssets before Swift/IPA commands can execute natively.
Only the iOS arm64 OpenSSL.xcframework slice is vendored to keep the repo device-build focused.
Standalone TrollStore/libroot payloads remain excluded because Litter targets SideStore/AltStore/developer sideload BuildKit workflows first.

notes: Builder.swift references LCUtils and ZSigner for signing/install paths.
OpenSSL.xcframework is trimmed to ios-arm64 for iPhone sideload builds.
